code: import React,{useEffect}from'react';import{useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import{supabase}from'../lib/supabase';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function AuthCallbackPage(){const navigate=useNavigate();useEffect(()=>{supabase.auth.exchangeCodeForSession(window.location.search).then(_ref=>{let error=_ref.error;if(error){console.error('Auth callback error:',error);navigate('/login?error=expired');}else{navigate('/');}});},[navigate]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{minHeight:'100vh',background:'#1a1a2e',display:'flex',alignItems:'center',justifyContent:'center'},children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{fontFamily:"'DM Mono', monospace",fontSize:13,color:'#a78bfa'},children:"Signing you in\u2026"})});}
